notableEvents.label: Everson Pereira pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Everson Pereira grounds into a force out, shortstop Anthony Volpe to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. Tristan Peters to 3rd. Sam Antonacci out at 2nd. Everson Pereira to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Luisangel Acuña pinch-hit
